member.name: T:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager
member.summary: Avalonia notification manager with support for toast and progress notifications. Supports two display modes: in-window overlay and separate topmost overlay window.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.SetHost(Avalonia.Controls.TopLevel)
member.summary: Attach the notification manager to a TopLevel (Window or similar). Must be called before showing notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.UseOverlayWindow
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to use a separate overlay window (true) or display notifications inside the host window (false). Can be toggled at runtime. Existing notifications are dismissed on switch.

member.name: P:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.ActiveHost
member.summary: Gets the currently active notification host (in-window or overlay).

member.name: P:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the notification position. Can be changed at runtime.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.ShowCustomContent(Avalonia.Controls.Control,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Nullable{Notification.Core.NotificationColor})
member.summary: Show a notification with custom Avalonia content.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.Show(Notification.Core.NotificationRequest)
member.summary: Show a toast notification from a NotificationRequest.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.ShowProgressBar(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Show a progress bar notification. Returns INotifierProgress to update progress. Dispose the returned object to close the notification.
member.param: Whether to show a Cancel button
Base message for time estimation (null to disable)

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.Dismiss(System.Guid)
member.summary: Dismiss a notification by ID.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.AvaloniaNotificationManager.DismissAll
member.summary: Dismiss all active notifications.

member.name: T:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost
member.summary: Custom notification overlay panel for Avalonia. Supports both toast and progress notifications. Injects into the Window content as a Grid overlay.

member.name: P:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position where notifications appear. Can be changed at runtime — takes effect immediately.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.AddCardToPanel(Avalonia.Controls.Border)
member.summary: For Bottom positions, new notifications are inserted at index 0 so the newest appears closest to the bottom edge (stack grows upward). For Top positions, new notifications are appended (stack grows downward).

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.EnsureAttached
member.summary: Ensure the host is attached (call from Show methods).

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.ShowToast(Notification.Core.NotificationRequest,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Show a toast notification with auto-dismiss and optional action buttons.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.ShowProgress(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Show a progress notification. Returns the card state for updating.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.ShowCustomContent(Avalonia.Controls.Control,System.TimeSpan,System.Nullable{Notification.Core.NotificationColor})
member.summary: Show a notification with custom Avalonia content.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.Close(System.Guid)
member.summary: Close a specific notification by ID.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.AvaloniaNotificationHost.CloseAll
member.summary: Close all notifications.

member.name: T:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.ProgressCardHandle
member.summary: Handle for updating a progress notification card from background threads.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.ProgressCardHandle.UpdateProgress(System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Update the progress notification from any thread.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.ProgressCardHandle.UpdateWaitingTime(System.String)
member.summary: Update the waiting time text.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.ProgressCardHandle.Close
member.summary: Close this progress notification card.

member.name: T:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.NotificationOverlayWindow
member.summary: Separate transparent topmost window for displaying notifications outside the main window. Positioned in the corner/edge of the screen based on NotificationPosition. Does not cover the full screen — only the notification area. Hidden from Alt+Tab via WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW on Windows.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.NotificationOverlayWindow.BindToParent(Avalonia.Controls.Window)
member.summary: Bind overlay lifetime to parent window — close overlay when parent closes. Also hides from Alt+Tab on Windows.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.NotificationOverlayWindow.ApplyToolWindowStyle
member.summary: On Windows, apply WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW extended style to hide from Alt+Tab.

member.name: M:Notification.Avalonia.Controls.NotificationOverlayWindow.ApplyPositionOnScreen(Avalonia.Controls.Window,Notification.Core.NotificationPosition)
member.summary: Position the overlay window on the correct edge of the screen based on the current notification position.

member.name: T:Notification.Avalonia.Progress.AvaloniaNotifierProgress
member.summary: Avalonia implementation of INotifierProgress. Updates the progress notification card and closes it on Dispose.
